final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum infographic for Chinese ethnic minority traditional costume, designed as a National Museum exhibition panel.

Style/medium: Museum exhibition infographic, archival textile illustration, National Museum of China panel style, restrained academic aesthetic, archival paper texture with subtle aging
Composition: Vertical layout divided into five zones: top banner with title, left structural breakdown with callout lines, upper-right material swatches, mid-right color/pattern legend, bottom flowchart; central full-figure standing subject wearing complete traditional attire
Subject: Miao ethnic group silver-ornamented festival costume with elaborate silver headdress, embroidered jacket, pleated skirt, silver jewelry layers
Scene/backdrop: Warm rice-paper or pale tea-colored museum panel background, subtle paper grain texture, generous margins, no decorative clutter
Color palette: Warm neutrals (ivory, pale tea, aged paper) as base; costume colors: indigo blue, vermillion red, silver white, black embroidery thread; restrained academic palette
Materials/textures: Hand-woven indigo-dyed cotton fabric texture, silver filigree metalwork, silk embroidery thread sheen, wax-resist batik patterns
Text (verbatim): "中国少数民族服饰"
Constraints: All text must be Simplified Chinese only; clear readable typography; no English or pinyin; accurate structural annotations; museum-grade academic tone; favicon-scale readability not required
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio photography look, e-commerce layout, anime illustration, cosplay styling, incorrect labeling, fake textures, decorative excess, 8K stuffer words
